summary: Executed backend pytest suite and frontend Playwright E2E for ShadowIntel requested MVP flows using public URL.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope.
When CRUSTDATA_API_KEY is provisioned, run one live-data regression cycle to replace fallback verification.
critical_code_review_comments: CRUSTDATA fallback mode is active when key is missing/placeholder; this path is intentional and should remain explicit in UI messaging.
No hardcoded internal localhost API URLs found; frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed data created; backend generated runtime records via tested endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated required endpoints (/api/health, /api/intelligence/briefing, /latest, /comparison, /chat) and nav/form/chat data-testid flows against public URL. Pytest report and screenshots are present.
rca of the issue: No functional defect reproduced in this cycle. NOTE: CRUSTDATA intelligence is currently MOCKED via fallback demo signals when API key is placeholder/missing (expected behavior).
